steps.title: Identify the slope of line v
steps.content: The equation of line $v$ is given as $y = 7x + 10$. This is in slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$, where $m$ is the slope. Therefore, the slope of line $v$ is 7.

steps.title: Apply the perpendicular lines rule to find the slope of line w
steps.content: When two lines are perpendicular, their slopes are negative reciprocals of each other. Since the slope of line $v$ is 7, the slope of line $w$ must be $-\frac{1}{7}$. D is correct.
